name: jupiter-swap
description: Quotes and executes Solana token swap transactions using the Jupiter aggregator. Input: a plain-language description of the swap (e.g. "Swap 0.1 SOL for USDC" or "Exchange 50 USDC for JUP with 1% slippage"). Do NOT pass JSON or structured data — describe the swap in natural language. The tool fetches the best route and quote, requests wallet signing from the coordinator, then submits the transaction.
